# EasyTrading

> A .NET client for decentralised perpetual and spot exchanges. One `IExchangeClient` interface across every supported DEX. HyperLiquid, Aster, and dYdX v4 are all at `1.2.3` on NuGet — REST + WebSocket + signing on each, with pre-flight validation, retry policy, and gap recovery. HyperLiquid + Aster sign EIP-712; dYdX v4 signs Cosmos SDK transactions (BIP-39 → BIP-32 → secp256k1 → bech32 → protobuf TxRaw → REST broadcast), end-to-end verified on testnet. Methods grouped by entity (Markets, Orders, Positions, Trades, Account, Transfers, Streams). `decimal` for money; `IAsyncEnumerable<T>` for streams; typed exceptions.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/polius2007/EasyTrading/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, install, quick start, status
- [Getting started](https://github.com/polius2007/EasyTrading/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): Step-by-step first trade — install, auth, testnet, mainnet
- [Recipes](https://github.com/polius2007/EasyTrading/blob/main/docs/recipes.md): Common patterns (limit, market, stop, batch, modify, streams, retry, builder fee, hosted service)
- [API reference](https://polius2007.github.io/EasyTrading/): Auto-generated DocFX site from XML doc-comments
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/polius2007/EasyTrading/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Convention summary for AI assistants
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/polius2007/EasyTrading/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Phase progress and release history

## Packages

- [EasyTrading.HyperLiquid](https://www.nuget.org/packages/EasyTrading.HyperLiquid): HyperLiquid client (REST + WebSocket + EIP-712 signing), stable at 1.2.3
- [EasyTrading.Aster](https://www.nuget.org/packages/EasyTrading.Aster): Aster Finance perp DEX client (REST + WebSocket + EIP-712 signing), stable at 1.2.3
- [EasyTrading.Dydx](https://www.nuget.org/packages/EasyTrading.Dydx): dYdX v4 client (Indexer REST + WebSocket + full Cosmos SDK transaction signing: BIP-39 → secp256k1 → bech32 → protobuf TxRaw → REST broadcast), stable at 1.2.3
- [EasyTrading.Abstractions](https://www.nuget.org/packages/EasyTrading.Abstractions): Cross-DEX interfaces and models (IExchangeClient, IEasyTradingBuilder, all DTOs)
- [EasyTrading.Core](https://www.nuget.org/packages/EasyTrading.Core): Shared infrastructure (HTTP, WS, retries, signing helpers)

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/polius2007/EasyTrading): Source, issues, releases

## Upstream

- [HyperLiquid API docs](https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs): Authoritative reference for HL endpoints, signing, rate limits
